\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
RWG basis function tied to a mesh triangle. 

Given a triangle and one of its vertices designated as the "{}free"{} vertex, the RWG function is (up to scale) linear along the triangle and proportional to (r − r\+\_\+free) (or the negative thereof) depending on orientation.

This class offers\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Construction from mesh, triangle, free vertex and side (FRONT/\+BACK).
\item Pointwise evaluation of the vector shape function on the triangle.
\item Accessors for triangle/edge bookkeeping and sign/orientation. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{RWGFun_8h_source_l00030}{30}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{RWGFun_8h_source}{RWGFun.\+h}}.



\doxysubsection{Constructor \& Destructor Documentation}
\Hypertarget{classRWGFun_af8d988b7a0c653432dbe1d7c2415028a}\index{RWGFun@{RWGFun}!RWGFun@{RWGFun}}
\index{RWGFun@{RWGFun}!RWGFun@{RWGFun}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{RWGFun()}{RWGFun()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{classRWGFun_af8d988b7a0c653432dbe1d7c2415028a} 
RWGFun\+::\+RWGFun (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{classSurfaceMesh}{Surface\+Mesh}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{in\+Mesh}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{classTriangle}{Triangle}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{in\+Tri}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_ae4271193b04e5d22237184d4fad54fb0}{rvec}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{in\+Free\+Vertex}{, }\item[{int}]{in\+Side}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Construct an RWG basis function tied to one triangle. 

Determines the opposite edge from {\ttfamily in\+Free\+Vertex}, resolves boundary conditions (periodic/symmetry) via \doxylink{classSurfaceMesh}{Surface\+Mesh} helpers if needed, and sets the orientation (inverted) based on {\ttfamily in\+Side} and geometry.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em in\+Mesh} & Owning mesh. \\
\hline
{\em in\+Tri} & Pointer to the triangle supporting this half-\/\+RWG. \\
\hline
{\em in\+Free\+Vertex} & Pointer to the free vertex of the RWG on {\ttfamily in\+Tri}. \\
\hline
{\em in\+Side} & FRONT or BACK (affects sign/orientation).\\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
Locates the edge opposite to {\ttfamily in\+Free\+Vertex}, handles boundary-\/condition edges (periodic/symmetry) by mapping and augmenting the mesh as needed, and determines the sign (inverted) based on the requested {\ttfamily in\+Side} and the geometric orientation between edge/normal/free-\/vertex. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{RWGFun_8cpp_source_l00014}{14}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{RWGFun_8cpp_source}{RWGFun.\+cpp}}.

\Hypertarget{classRWGFun_a7540ce2f84c6b42a29c2808504c47d42}\index{RWGFun@{RWGFun}!Evaluate@{Evaluate}}
\index{Evaluate@{Evaluate}!RWGFun@{RWGFun}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{Evaluate()}{Evaluate()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{classRWGFun_a7540ce2f84c6b42a29c2808504c47d42} 
\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_ae4271193b04e5d22237184d4fad54fb0}{rvec}} RWGFun\+::\+Evaluate (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_ae4271193b04e5d22237184d4fad54fb0}{rvec}}}]{r}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Evaluate the RWG vector shape function at a point on the triangle. 

Returns $\pm$(r − r\+\_\+free) \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} L\+\_\+edge / (2 \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} A\+\_\+triangle), where the sign depends on orientation (inverted flag). The caller must ensure {\ttfamily r} lies on the triangle; no membership check is performed here.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em r} & Point of evaluation (in the triangle\textquotesingle{}s plane). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
RWG vector value at {\ttfamily r}.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Evaluate the RWG vector function at point {\ttfamily r} on the triangle.

Uses the standard half-\/\+RWG formula\+: f(r) = $\pm$ (r − r\+\_\+free) \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} (L\+\_\+edge) / (2 A\+\_\+tri), where the sign is controlled by \doxylink{classRWGFun_a70f64de5567b30165248fc93296016d9}{Inverted()}.
